report.title: Error 401 when using Stripe
report.body: Every time I tap buy, it says unauthorized. Also the app runs very slow on my Pixel 6.

report.title: App crashes on start for Android 10
report.body: Just updated my OS and now I can't even get past the splash screen.

report.title: White screen on dashboard
report.body: Don't know what's going on... help! It worked yesterday. I use Chrome.
